name: Riley Baik
headline: Senior Product Manager | AI/ML · Search & Discovery · E-commerce
summary: AI Product Manager (9+ years) specializing in search, discovery, and intelligent product experiences. Track record of shipping AI-powered systems — from hybrid search and ranking to conversational AI and LLM-driven pipelines — that drive measurable impact at scale.

experience.title: Product Manager III – Product Discovery
bullets: Led hybrid AI-powered search experience launch across 3 international marketplaces, partnering with AI researchers to optimize user engagement through A/B testing, resulting in 20% CTR increase and executive approval for global expansion

Partnered with ML engineers to improve search ranking using behavioral signals and catalog metadata, defining relevance metrics and experiment success criteria; improved precision@3 by 30% and 1st-result CTR by 45%

Defined success metrics for search engagement and led instrumentation strategy in partnership with engineering and analytics teams. Leveraged behavioral insights to iterate search experiences, increasing search success rate by 15% and CTR by 25% QoQ

Defined requirements and led delivery of an automated AEO strategy and pipeline to extract and structure catalog metadata (product attributes, inventory, pricing) from PIM into schema markup, boosting AI agent traffic by 8x and increasing conversion by 40% within 12 weeks

Led end-to-end delivery of on-site conversational AI chat experience, from scope definition and conversation flow design to production launch in partnership with marketing, UX, and engineering to support product discovery and comparison for users

Developed a personalized recommendation API with data scientists using product, browsing, and purchase data, leveraged it to launch an add-ons page with UX designers and engineers, boosting AOV by 15%

Streamlined product discovery funnels by launching category-specific finder experiences and optimizing taxonomy. Increased PDP view rate per visit by 45% (from 30% to 45%) and reduced bounce rate by 50% via improved assortment visibility and guided shopping flows

Optimized product detail page (PDP) components for a major product launch by partnering with merchandising, pricing, and content teams, enhancing Buy Box strategy, offer visibility, and content quality to improve customer experience

Defined the on-site search product vision and roadmap for Samsung.com, partnering with UX, engineering, and data science teams to enhance back-end logic and front-end UX/UI. Planned and led a phased rollout with A/B testing across key funnels, increasing web navigation CSAT score (NPS) by 20% QoQ and improving engagement for 10M+ monthly users

experience.title: Senior Product Manager – Product Listing Tool
bullets: Automated product listing workflows for 2M+ B2B sellers by launching an ML-driven auto-fill system, reducing manual listing time by 80%. Partnered with science and engineering to design multi-modal classification and data-mapping pipelines that translated seller inputs into structured catalog templates across 20+ high-impact categories

Optimized vendor onboarding process by incorporating Brand Protection registration into the core workflow, removing separate sign-up steps and proactively capturing brand ownership data. Increased overall Ease-of-Use (EoU) score by 380bps and reduced onboarding completion time by 2 days, while expanding protection coverage for B2B sellers through authoritative brand data

Saved $1.4M in operational cost by enhancing self-serve workflow for B2B sellers that reduced manual contacts with support agents. Identified key issues in listing experience based on 10+ interviews and 300+ surveys from B2B sellers and partnered with 5 dependent teams to develop solution to easily correct sellers' brand and catalog information

experience.title: Product Manager II – Growth
bullets: Built ML-driven personalized recommendation systems across the conversion funnel (PDP, Cart, Checkout), increasing AOV by 25% ($148 to $185) through model optimization and iterative A/B testing with data scientist, engineers, and UX designers

Launched ML-powered virtual try-on feature with size recommendation, achieving 70% adoption rate with 40% reduction in return rate MoM by leading the end-to-end product lifecycle from discovery, prototyping, and iteration to GTM execution

Optimized product detail page components (variation, pricing, offers, description, etc.) and their placement through A/B testing in partnership with UX designer to improve engagement, increasing conversion rates by 15% (1.12% → 1.29%)

Led initiative to build self-service return management system with customer support, engineering, logistics, operations, and finance teams to provide real-time visibility into return and refund status, reducing return-related support calls by 60%

Spearheaded end-to-end launch of live commerce feature on mobile app, growing audience 250% YoY. Defined user stories and requirements based on user interviews and market research, conducted A/B testing for usability, and iterated on feature enhancements for streamlined shopping experience during live commerce shows, contributing to 300% mobile sales growth YoY

Led cross-functional team to design a unified customer data platform (CDP), integrating offline (POS, SAP CRM) and online behavioral data to create a single customer view in BigQuery. Defined requirements for analytics tool integration (Google Analytics, Looker, Tableau), driving a 45% increase in marketing campaign ROI

Restructured new customer benefit package and revamped onboarding workflow, increasing first purchase rate by 30%. Designed segmentation-driven CRM marketing program and boosted 1-year retention by 7% and re-purchase rate by 15%

experience.title: Product Manager I – Marketing Technology
bullets: Built CRM personalization system with segmentation, user journey mapping, dynamic messaging, and channel optimization, increasing engagement CTR by 50% YoY (from 8 to 12%) across email, in-app, and push

Developed A/B testing and automation toolset to optimize storefront content merchandising by automating top-performing banner selection based on daily metrics (sessions, CTR, sales), driving 30% GMV growth YoY ($2.5M)

Delivered unified Customer Data Platform (CDP) by integrating Google Analytics and Tableau, increasing marketing ROI by 45% and reducing planning time by 60% from 10 to 4 days with automated reporting

education.degree: Master of Science, Business Analytics and Information Management
Bachelor of Science, Business Administration (Cum Laude)

key_achievements: Launched hybrid AI search across 3 international markets → CTR +20%
AEO pipeline → AI agent traffic 8x, conversion +40% in 12 weeks
Recommendation system → AOV +25% ($148 to $185) on $2B+ GMV platform
Samsung.com search → 10M+ monthly users, NPS +20% QoQ
Amazon B2B listing tool → listing time -80% for 2M+ sellers, $1.4M cost savings

hard_filters: must be onsite outside preferred locations

primary_proof_points: AI-powered search launched across 3 international markets
AEO pipeline → AI agent traffic 8x in 12 weeks
PDP view rate from 30% to 45%, bounce rate -50%
Amazon B2B listing automation → -80% listing time, $1.4M savings
positioning_rules: Position as AI/search product PM, not ML infrastructure PM.
Emphasize search relevance, discovery funnel, experimentation, and customer outcomes.
Use fine-tuning language cautiously — frame as PM-led optimization, not hands-on ML modeling.
For platform roles, emphasize catalog, seller tools, workflow automation, and structured data.
Lead with AI/search experience; Kolon is supporting evidence for scale and funnel depth.
